metadata.title: Link Wallet
metadata.description: Connect your Google account to your Metacube wallet on Starknet. Securely link your identity for seamless access to Web3 gaming assets, ownership verification, and blockchain integration.
metadata.keywords: metacube, wallet linking, google account integration, starknet wallet, web3 authentication, blockchain identity, digital asset access, secure wallet connection, web3 login, starknet dapp, crypto wallet, blockchain account
metadata.ogImageAlt: Metacube - Web3 Gaming Platform on Starknet

linkWallet.title: Link Your Wallet
linkWallet.verifyAddress: Please verify your wallet address carefully before confirming. This action cannot be undone and the address cannot be changed afterwards.
linkWallet.successfullyLinked: Your wallet {address} is successfully linked to {username} account!

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred while linking your wallet.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

errors.enterValidGuestId: Please enter a valid Guest ID
errors.failedConnectGuestId: Failed to connect with this Guest ID
errors.connectWalletFailed: Failed to connect to wallet. Please try again.
errors.linkWalletFailed: Failed to link wallet. Please try again.
